title: thelymitra viridis
intro: Thelymitra viridis, commonly known as the green-leafed sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Thelymitra viridis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Thelymitra viridis are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
